name.value: Amulet of proof against detection and location #2

description.value: Aura moderate abjuration; CL 8th; Slot neck; Price 35,000 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION This silver amulet protects the wearer from scrying and magical location just as a nondetection spell does. If a divination spell is attempted against the wearer, the caster of the divination must succeed on a caster level check (1d20 + caster level ) against a DC of 19 (as if the wearer had cast nondetection on herself ). CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Craft Wondrous Item, nondetection; Cost 17,500 gp
